extensionDescription.message: Send YouTube videos to Gemini for summarization.

popupDescription.message: Configure the summary language, prompt, and sending behavior.

autoSubmitWarning.message: When enabled, clicking Summarize automatically sends the video title, URL, and your prompt to Gemini. Disabled by default.

inputNotFound.message: Could not find the input. Paste the copied prompt manually.

promptInserted.message: Prompt inserted. Review it, then press Send.

sendNotFound.message: Prompt inserted, but Send could not be found. Press it manually.

automationFailed.message: Automation failed. Paste the copied prompt manually.
